title: Add load testing with k6
original_text: Added load testing using k6. Created load test scenarios for API endpoints. Implemented stress testing for peak traffic. Implemented soak testing for long-running stability. Added spike testing for sudden traffic increases. Implemented load test reporting with metrics. Added CI integration for automated load tests. Result: load tests meet performance targets.
expected_subject: test(perf): add load testing with k6
expected_body_lines: - Create load test scenarios for API endpoints
- Implement stress testing for peak traffic
- Implement soak testing for long-running stability
- Add spike testing for sudden traffic increases
- Add load test reporting and CI integration
- Validation: load tests meet performance targets
expected_command: git commit -m "test(perf): add load testing with k6"
